headline: Georgia's Five Largest Banks to Transform Treasury Infrastructure in Landmark Partnership Between Nasdaq Calypso and The National Bank of Georgia
summary: Shared Platform Backed by The National Bank of Georgia Will Deliver Trusted Global Infrastructure to Support Growth of the Banking SectorTBILISI, Georgia and NEW YORK, July 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Nasdaq (Nasdaq: NDAQ) today announced a landmark partnership with the National Bank of Georgia (NBG) to modernize the treasury and financial markets infrastructure across Georgia's banking sector.
